title: Voltage is voltage — stripped to the wave
motto: If it is voltage, it is voltage. No encoding. Strip to the wave; the rest is potential energy.

shed.honest_limit: Reduces CPU/USB/disk draw; cannot dump RF energy at the antenna in software

layers.wave: Raw voltage vs time — I/Q rails or baseband Volts, no framing
layers.strip: Everything removed to reach the wave — carrier, encoding, protocol, metadata
layers.potential_energy: Energy budget in the strip — ∫V²dt proxy, not trusted as signal
